tagline: Demon Slayer — Demon slayers burn their lifespan to unleash solar power against immortal demons.
visualizationReason: Demon Slayer is fundamentally a kill-economy matchup system: each duel is decided by how breathing forms, blood arts, poison, sunlight constraints, and decapitation windows counter each other.

headerFlavor.sysWarning: // [ATTRITION_LOOP]: REGENERATION ADVANTAGE DETECTED — HUMAN OVERCLOCK PROTOCOLS ACTIVE

aiInsights.casual: Demon Slayer looks flashy, but the fights are brutally practical: demons regenerate forever unless you hit one of a few hard kill conditions, while slayers can only win by timing perfect openings and paying with their bodies. The counter-tree view works because every big battle is about matchup logic — who can force the other side into a losing condition first.
aiInsights.deep: The universe runs on asymmetric resource curves. Demons have near-infinite stamina and regeneration but hard environmental constraints (sunlight, Nichirin decapitation, selective toxins), while slayers use finite metabolic overclocking through breathing and marks that accelerate long-term physiological failure. Combat therefore behaves like conditional execution: victory goes to the side that can force state transition into a terminal rule set (sun exposure, neck severance, anti-regeneration poison stack, or strategic immobilization) before its own cost curve collapses.

powerSystem.name: Total Concentration Breathing
powerSystem.subtitle: Metabolic Overclock Protocol
powerSystem.loreDesc: A disciplined breathing method that lets slayers push body temperature, oxygenation, and muscle output beyond normal limits to challenge monsters that should be physically unbeatable.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A voluntary cardiopulmonary amplification stack that temporarily increases output, reaction speed, and blade control while rapidly consuming endurance and structural integrity.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Tanjiro chaining Water and Sun forms under life-threatening oxygen debt to maintain pressure against Upper Rank opponents.

powerSystem.name: Nichirin Blades
powerSystem.subtitle: Solar-Encoded Kill Interface
powerSystem.loreDesc: Swords forged from ore that absorbs sunlight, giving humans a way to permanently kill demons through precise neck severance.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A specialized hardware layer that converts otherwise non-terminal damage into valid kill events when strike geometry intersects cervical critical zones.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Mitsuri and Obanai coordinating blade trajectories in Infinity Castle to create a decapitation opportunity against Muzan.

powerSystem.name: Blood Demon Arts
powerSystem.subtitle: Mutated Ability Runtime
powerSystem.loreDesc: Demonic techniques born from Muzan's blood that bend space, flesh, perception, or elemental phenomena into lethal battlefield tools.
powerSystem.systemDesc: Individualized mutation modules that grant demons high-variance control abilities, often creating terrain denial, debuffs, or regeneration-compatible offense loops.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Akaza's Compass Needle reading fighting spirit vectors to auto-adjust offense and defense in real time.

powerSystem.name: Demon Slayer Mark
powerSystem.subtitle: Lifespan-for-Output Contract
powerSystem.loreDesc: A crest awakening under extreme conditions that dramatically amplifies slayer performance, but ties the user to a shortened life trajectory.
powerSystem.systemDesc: A high-risk amplification state that multiplies throughput at the cost of accelerated systemic wear and long-horizon survivability.
powerSystem.signatureMoment: Muichiro activating his mark to reverse an Upper Rank engagement despite severe pre-existing damage.

characters.name: Tanjiro Kamado
characters.title: Adaptive Frontline Executor
characters.loreBio: A compassionate swordsman whose family was slaughtered by demons, Tanjiro fights to restore Nezuko and end Muzan's cycle of predation. He fuses disciplined empathy with relentless tactical adjustment.
characters.systemBio: Primary adaptation node capable of switching breathing patterns and threat priorities mid-fight, making him unusually resilient in volatile matchup trees.
characters.signatureMoment: Unlocking Hinokami Kagura chains while cornered, transforming a losing exchange into a viable kill window.
characters.description: determined slate-wielding water breather who hunts demons after his family is slaughtered and his sister Nezuko is turned
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Valentine-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Kimetsu no Utage Tokubetsu-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen

characters.name: Nezuko Kamado
characters.title: Solar-Exception Demon
characters.loreBio: Turned into a demon but retaining protective attachment to humans, Nezuko becomes the system anomaly Muzan has searched for: demon survivability without sunlight death.
characters.systemBio: Constraint-breaking demonic node whose sunlight immunity invalidates the species' core environmental lock and destabilizes Muzan's strategic monopoly.
characters.signatureMoment: Conquering sunlight after the Swordsmith Village battle and proving the demon constraint set is mutable.
characters.description: soft-spoken demon girl who retains human consciousness despite her transformation, fighting to protect those she loves
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Valentine-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Kimetsu no Utage Tokubetsu-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen

characters.name: Muzan Kibutsuji
characters.title: Origin Node of Demonkind
characters.loreBio: The first demon, Muzan created and controls the demonic lineage while obsessively seeking immunity to sunlight. He governs through fear, secrecy, and disposable subordinates.
characters.systemBio: Centralized root process controlling demon replication, command hierarchy, and kill-switch curses; highest throughput entity with strategic dependence on removing solar vulnerability.
characters.signatureMoment: Launching the Infinity Castle collapse sequence to force all remaining slayers into one terminal attrition arena.
characters.description: immortal demon progenitor who views humans as inferior, relentlessly hunting the Tamado and Ufotable's breath styles
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie 1: Mugenjou-hen - Akaza Sairai

characters.name: Kyojuro Rengoku
characters.title: Flame Hashira Bulwark
characters.loreBio: A charismatic Hashira whose unwavering resolve inspires allies even in hopeless scenarios. Rengoku turns a doomed defense into a moral and tactical inflection point for the Corps.
characters.systemBio: High-output defensive anchor capable of delaying superior demon threats long enough for mission-critical asset preservation and downstream morale amplification.
characters.signatureMoment: Holding Akaza in place until dawn pressure nearly converts the engagement into an environmental kill.
characters.description: flame Hashira with an unwavering moral compass who battles demons with passionate honesty
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Valentine-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen

characters.name: Giyu Tomioka
characters.title: Water Hashira Precision Node
characters.loreBio: A stoic veteran who first spares Tanjiro and Nezuko, Giyu embodies the Corps' strict professionalism while quietly enabling its most important exception.
characters.systemBio: Low-noise high-accuracy combat operator with elite defensive form execution, ideal for neutralizing high-speed demons and stabilizing chaotic fronts.
characters.signatureMoment: Deploying Dead Calm to nullify Akaza's momentum spikes and buy critical survival time.
characters.description: reserved water Hashira who carries survivor's guilt, master of the water breathing style
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Valentine-hen
Chuukou Ikkan!! Kimetsu Gakuen Monogatari: Kimetsu no Utage Tokubetsu-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen

characters.name: Shinobu Kocho
characters.title: Poison Doctrine Architect
characters.loreBio: Unable to decapitate upper demons by strength alone, Shinobu weaponizes intellect, chemistry, and self-sacrifice to engineer anti-regeneration kill routes.
characters.systemBio: Specialist countermeasure node that substitutes direct execution with layered biochemical disruption, enabling team-based upper-rank deletion strategies.
characters.signatureMoment: Embedding a body-saturated wisteria payload so Douma's consumption triggers delayed internal collapse.
characters.description: insect Hashira with a deceptive cheerful demeanor who fights with precision and lethal grace
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie 1: Mugenjou-hen - Akaza Sairai

characters.name: Akaza
characters.title: Upper Rank Three Duel Engine
characters.loreBio: A battle-obsessed upper moon who seeks worthy opponents and despises weakness, Akaza combines brutal close-quarters force with predictive combat senses.
characters.systemBio: High-frequency melee optimizer using intent-tracking to anticipate attacks, producing sustained offensive pressure and rapid regeneration under heavy damage.
characters.signatureMoment: Overwhelming multiple Hashira-level fighters by reading their battle spirit vectors before strike commitment.
characters.description: demon moon with a code of honor who respects strength above all else

characters.name: Kokushibo
characters.title: Upper Rank One Legacy Anomaly
characters.loreBio: A former swordsman from the Sengoku era turned demon, Kokushibo embodies the terrifying fusion of elite breathing mastery and immortal regeneration.
characters.systemBio: Top-tier hybrid node combining centuries of sword optimization with demon recovery loops, creating near-unmatched duel persistence.
characters.signatureMoment: Forcing a multi-Hashira coalition into sacrificial sequencing just to create a single viable decapitation attempt.
characters.description: first upper moon with peerless swordsmanship and devastating blood demon techniques

characters.name: Douma
characters.title: Upper Rank Two Absorption Predator
characters.loreBio: A smiling cult leader who treats slaughter as ritual theater, Douma weaponizes freezing blood arts and ingestion-based kills against emotionally destabilized opponents.
characters.systemBio: Area-denial and attrition node using cryogenic debuffs, aerosol toxins, and consumption mechanics to degrade enemy output over time.
characters.signatureMoment: Suppressing multiple high-level slayers with room-scale frost constructs before being compromised by Shinobu's poison architecture.
characters.description: cold, manipulative upper moon who feigns compassion while committing horrors

characters.name: Kagaya Ubuyashiki
characters.title: Corps Strategic Coordinator
characters.loreBio: Physically frail but spiritually unwavering, Kagaya guides the Corps through long-term intelligence, morale stewardship, and sacrificial command decisions.
characters.systemBio: Low-mobility high-impact command node coordinating distributed slayer assets and timing convergence operations for maximum strategic leverage.
characters.signatureMoment: Triggering a planned self-sacrifice blast to pin Muzan in place and initiate the final containment phase.
characters.description: terminally ill leader of the Demon Slayer Corps who orchestrates the war against Muzan
relationships: Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie: Mugen Ressha-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba: Katanakaji no Sato-hen
Kimetsu no Yaiba Movie 1: Mugenjou-hen - Akaza Sairai

factions.name: Demon Slayer Corps
factions.loreDesc: A secret Taisho-era organization of swordsmen and support units that hunts demons at night to protect civilians.
factions.systemDesc: Decentralized human resistance network optimized for reconnaissance, specialized matchups, and coordinated kill-condition execution.

factions.name: Twelve Kizuki
factions.loreDesc: Muzan's elite demon cadre ranked by strength, each with unique blood arts and extreme regenerative resilience.
factions.systemDesc: Tiered high-threat subnetwork providing force projection, territory control, and attritional suppression for the root demon process.

factions.name: Muzan's Inner Control Network
factions.loreDesc: A fear-based command structure maintained through blood dependence, secrecy, and lethal punishment for disobedience.
factions.systemDesc: Centralized governance layer using curse-enforced compliance, information compartmentalization, and disposable subordinate architecture.

factions.name: Wisteria Safehouse & Support Grid
factions.loreDesc: Medical estates, swordsmith villages, and civilian allies that keep slayers supplied, hidden, and alive.
factions.systemDesc: Logistics and recovery infrastructure sustaining mission continuity, equipment refresh cycles, and casualty stabilization.

rules.name: Sunlight Is Absolute
rules.subtitle: Phototoxic Terminal Rule
rules.loreConsequence: Even the strongest demon is annihilated by direct sun exposure, forcing demon activity into nocturnal windows.
rules.systemEquivalent: Global hard constraint: sunlight applies unavoidable fatal damage-over-time that bypasses regeneration.

rules.name: Nichirin Decapitation Requirement
rules.subtitle: Valid Kill Condition
rules.loreConsequence: Most demons survive massive injury unless their neck is cut by sunlight-forged steel.
rules.systemEquivalent: Permanent deletion requires cervical critical hit from authenticated weapon class; other damage routes auto-heal.

rules.name: Breathing Output Has a Human Cost
rules.subtitle: Finite Physiology Law
rules.loreConsequence: Slayers gain explosive combat performance, but fatigue, injury, and organ strain escalate rapidly.
rules.systemEquivalent: Performance multipliers consume limited biological resources, creating steep endurance and survivability decay curves.

rules.name: Muzan Name Curse
rules.subtitle: Speech-Level Compliance Trap
rules.loreConsequence: Demons who reveal Muzan's identity can be destroyed instantly from within by his curse.
rules.systemEquivalent: Remote failsafe trigger tied to prohibited disclosure events, enforcing extreme information containment.

rules.name: Mark Awakening Shortens Lifespan
rules.subtitle: Sacrificial Amplification Contract
rules.loreConsequence: The Demon Slayer Mark grants huge combat gains but condemns most users to early death.
rules.systemEquivalent: High-gain mode applies irreversible long-term survivability penalty in exchange for immediate performance uplift.

rankings.systemName: Demon Threat and Slayer Response Tiers
rankings.topTierLore: Muzan and the highest Upper Moons can erase squads, outlast prolonged engagements, and force sacrificial coalition tactics.
rankings.topTierSystem: Root and apex nodes with regeneration dominance, high-output blood art runtime, and multi-opponent suppression capacity.

tiers.name: Hashira / Upper Rank Engagement Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Battles at this level reshape entire missions; even winning usually demands irreversible cost.
tiers.systemDesc: Elite confrontation band where kill windows are narrow and resource conversion efficiency decides outcomes.

tiers.name: Mid-Rank Demon & Kinoe-Level Slayer Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Experienced slayers can clear these threats with coordinated breathing and tactical terrain use.
tiers.systemDesc: Operational tier defined by matchup knowledge, stamina management, and disciplined execution of known counters.

tiers.name: Civilian / Low-Rank Exposure Tier
tiers.loreDesc: Untrained humans are overwhelmingly vulnerable during nocturnal encounters.
tiers.systemDesc: Baseline nodes lacking combat protocols, dependent on external protection and early warning networks.

relationships.loreDesc: Tanjiro's mission exists to protect Nezuko's humanity and prove demons are not uniformly irredeemable.
relationships.systemDesc: Core protective dependency that drives strategic risk-taking and adaptation choices across all major arcs.

relationships.loreDesc: Muzan rules the Upper Moons through terror and blood authority, treating them as disposable instruments.
relationships.systemDesc: Central controller dependency chain distributing commands to elite sub-processes with punitive compliance enforcement.

relationships.loreDesc: Shinobu's personal grudge and scientific preparation converge into a long-planned anti-Douma execution route.
relationships.systemDesc: Adversarial edge where direct damage incapability is replaced by delayed toxin-stack kill logic.

relationships.loreDesc: Giyu's early trust in Tanjiro and Nezuko creates the narrative opening that keeps both alive.
relationships.systemDesc: Mentorship link that authorizes exception handling and accelerates trainee integration into high-risk operations.

relationships.loreDesc: Kokushibo serves Muzan as the strongest upper moon while pursuing his own fixation on surpassing human limits.
relationships.systemDesc: High-capability alliance coupling root-node command authority with top-tier execution throughput.

relationships.loreDesc: Akaza's admiration for strength clashes with Rengoku's refusal to abandon human values, producing one of the series' purest ideological duels.
relationships.systemDesc: Rivalry edge between regeneration-optimized offense and conviction-driven defensive endurance under sunrise pressure.

relationships.loreDesc: Kagaya invests strategic trust in Tanjiro as a catalyst for ending the cycle.
relationships.systemDesc: Command-to-field alliance routing intelligence and mission priority toward the highest adaptation node.

relationships.loreDesc: Nezuko's sunlight survival directly threatens Muzan's centuries-long objective and triggers his most aggressive hunting behavior.
relationships.systemDesc: Constraint-breaking anomaly versus root-process objective conflict over ownership of the sole sunlight-immunity pathway.

counterplay.mechanic: Slayers layer immobilization and timing to force a valid terminal neck-cut before tissue recovery completes.
counterplay.loreDesc: Even monsters who heal instantly can fall if multiple fighters create one perfect opening.
counterplay.systemDesc: Team sequencing converts infinite-heal target into finite-state kill event by synchronizing control and strike vectors.

counterplay.mechanic: Disrupting readable battle intent reduces predictive accuracy and creates micro-openings for clean hits.
counterplay.loreDesc: Breaking your own habits can make Akaza miss the beat he relies on.
counterplay.systemDesc: Signal obfuscation attack against intent-tracking model lowers forecast confidence and reaction efficiency.

counterplay.mechanic: Biochemical payload bypasses terrain control by degrading demon internals after ingestion/absorption.
counterplay.loreDesc: Shinobu wins by turning Douma's appetite into a trap.
counterplay.systemDesc: Indirect kill vector ignores frontal control pressure and targets regeneration substrate integrity.

counterplay.defender: Drug stack plus rotational relay assault
counterplay.mechanic: Tamayo's compounds slow mutation and division while exhausted Hashira rotate to preserve pressure until dawn.
counterplay.loreDesc: No single fighter can beat Muzan; they survive by passing the burden in waves.
counterplay.systemDesc: Compound debuff architecture plus distributed duty cycling prevents frontline collapse against superior throughput node.

counterplay.mechanic: Humans trade direct kills for stalling maneuvers that drag elites into sunrise fatality windows.
counterplay.loreDesc: Sometimes winning means lasting until first light.
counterplay.systemDesc: Temporal counterplay converts environmental constraint into scheduled execution event.

anomalies.name: Nezuko's Sunlight Immunity
anomalies.loreDesc: A demon survives daylight, overturning the oldest law in the war.
anomalies.systemDesc: Constraint exception indicating demon phenotype can bypass global phototoxic terminal rule.

anomalies.name: Tamayo's Defection
anomalies.loreDesc: A demon physician escapes Muzan's dominion and weaponizes medicine against him.
anomalies.systemDesc: Former subordinate node breaks command-lock and initiates anti-root biochemical research branch.

causalEvents.name: Muzan Creates the Demon Lineage
causalEvents.trigger: Experimental treatment prevents Muzan's death but mutates him into the first demon.
causalEvents.consequence: A self-propagating predator network emerges with sunlight vulnerability and regenerative dominance.
causalEvents.loreDesc: A desperate bid for life births centuries of night terror.
causalEvents.systemDesc: Origin event instantiates root process and all downstream infection branches.

causalEvents.name: Kamado Family Massacre
causalEvents.trigger: Muzan attacks Tanjiro's household, leaving Nezuko transformed.
causalEvents.consequence: Tanjiro enters the Corps and the central anti-Muzan campaign gains its key adaptation node.
causalEvents.loreDesc: Personal tragedy ignites the story's core promise.
causalEvents.systemDesc: Catalyst event redirects civilian node into high-priority resistance pipeline.

causalEvents.name: Rengoku vs Akaza at Mugen Train
causalEvents.trigger: Upper Rank Three intercepts after Enmu's defeat.
causalEvents.consequence: Corps loses a Hashira but secures strategic proof that upper ranks can be pressured by dawn constraints.
causalEvents.loreDesc: A heroic loss becomes a doctrine for everyone who survives.
causalEvents.systemDesc: High-cost engagement yields critical data on stall-based environmental counterplay viability.

causalEvents.name: Nezuko Conquers the Sun
causalEvents.trigger: Extreme combat stress and evolution in Swordsmith Village.
causalEvents.consequence: Muzan reprioritizes the entire war toward capturing Nezuko as a sunlight-immunity template.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The impossible happens, and every faction changes course.
causalEvents.systemDesc: Anomaly event rewrites antagonist objective tree and global threat allocation.

causalEvents.name: Infinity Castle Final Operation
causalEvents.trigger: Ubuyashiki initiates sacrificial ambush to force direct confrontation.
causalEvents.consequence: All key nodes converge into a terminal attrition battle resolved by drug stacking, relay tactics, and sunrise exposure.
causalEvents.loreDesc: The hidden war collapses into one endless night before dawn.
causalEvents.systemDesc: Endgame convergence event where distributed resistance attempts root-process deletion under time-locked environmental constraints.

systemQuestions.question: How does breathing style combat actually generate advantage?
systemQuestions.answer: Breathing styles are disciplined execution frameworks that convert training, timing, and physiology into repeatable combat outcomes.

systemQuestions.question: Why do matchups matter more than raw strength in many fights?
systemQuestions.answer: Counterplay shows branch-specific interactions where tempo, regeneration limits, and style compatibility decide outcomes.

systemQuestions.question: What are the core rules that demons and slayers cannot ignore?
systemQuestions.answer: Core laws map sunlight, nichirin constraints, and vulnerability windows that define all viable strategies.

systemQuestions.question: How do corps command and Upper Moon pressure reshape the war?
systemQuestions.answer: Faction dynamics explain how centralized discipline meets decentralized high-threat adversaries.

systemQuestions.question: What makes Demon Slayer structurally distinct?
systemQuestions.answer: It is a constrained attrition system: survival depends on maintaining technical discipline under severe physical and emotional load.

hero.microHook: Read the matchup economy before ranking strength.
hero.thesis: Demon Slayer is fundamentally a kill-economy matchup system: each duel is decided by how breathing forms, blood arts, poison, sunlight cons…

introductionSummary: Demon Slayer maps a nocturnal immortality economy — demons feeding on humans in exchange for supernatural abilities — against a corps of demon slayers burning their own lifespan for solar-grade kill windows. Each breathing style, blood art, and sunlight constraint creates a kill-economy matchup system where the question isn't who is stronger, but who has the right counter at the right distance.
